arts.ttl: Who is Yeremay Hernandez? Get to know the exciting Spain under-21 international linked with £17m Chelsea move
arts.sum: Chelsea are rumoured to be interested in signing Deportivo La Coruna player Yeremay Hernandez in the January transfer window. Hernandez is enjoying the best season...

arts.ttl: Chelsea hold talks with Bundesliga giants over Carney Chukwuemeka loan
arts.sum: Chelsea have held talks with Borussia Dortmund over a loan move for midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £50m player really wants to leave Stamford Bridge, Chelsea believe an exit will happen soon
Report: Chelsea could now loan £45m player to club with eight European trophies, he would join awful Thomas Tuchel signing
arts.sum: They can talk about their bad experiences at Stamford Bridge!

arts.ttl: Aarons completes loan move from Cherries to Valencia
arts.sum: Max Aarons has completed a loan move to Valencia for the remainder of the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea with clear run at Mainoo after latest Man Utd update
arts.sum: Chelsea's faint hopes of signing Kobbie Mainoo have been boosted by news coming out of Germany that, contrary to some rumours, Bayern Munich are not interested in the Manchester United wonderkid. Shortly after the news broke that Man Utd could cash in on Mainoo, it was claimed that Chelsea were the favourites to secure his signature, but since then, more names have entered the fray.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca’s recent comments suggest £52m player’s career at Chelsea could be about to end amid January interest
arts.sum: Chelsea are poised to lose a number of first team players in January as they look to strengthen their squad for the manager midway through...

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund begin talks with Chelsea to sign Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have begun talks with Chelsea over the signing of Carney Chukwuemeka on loan, according to Florian Plettenberg. Dortmund are keen on signing the attacking midfielder and initial discussions…

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Renato Veiga talks, Chelsea transfers, Noni Madueke fitness
arts.sum: He [journalist] asked me about Renato playing in four or five different positions, Reece James is doing the same, Cucu is doing the same, most of the players are doing the same. "I think he played on the right in the first game of the season against City but with Malo Gusto overlapping, Cole would finish in the same position, in the pocket.

arts.ttl: Reporter reveals Man United star’s “priority” following Chelsea transfer approach
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo’s priority is reportedly to stay and sign a new contract with Manchester United despite interest from Chelsea. It was recently reported by Simon Phillips that the Blues were trying to turn Mainoo’s head, but it remains to be seen how likely it actually is that they’ll be able to lure the England international […] The post Reporter reveals Man United star’s “priority” following Chelsea transfer approach appeared first on CaughtOffside.
